name: Foot in the Fire Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Sift flour and sugar; set aside.
3. In a saucepan, bring margarine, cocoa, and water to a boil; remove from heat.
4. In a large bowl, mix all remaining cake ingredients: eggs, sugar, margarine, evaporated milk, vanilla extract, baking soda, cocoa, cinnamon, and salt.
5. Add the flour mixture and cocoa mixture, stirring well.
6. Bake in a greased and floured 9x13-inch pan for 20 to 30 minutes, or until a clean toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Ten minutes into baking, prepare the frosting: Place margarine, cocoa, and milk in a saucepan and bring to a boil; remove from heat and add the remaining ingredients. Beat until smooth.
8. Frost the cake as soon as it comes out of the oven. Let cool slightly before cutting, if possible.
